title: SupersMC
description:
A modpack that makes minecraft more immersive.
Official superserver modpack.
body:
# SupersMC Minecraft Modpack

**Note that this modpack is still in beta and there might be bugs**

**To see what mods the modpack uses, check the dependencies of the latest release. All credit goes to the mod authors. If you are a mod author and you don't want the mod in my modpack, contact me using e-mail: kakskemail@gmail.com**

**Legal notice**: I am currently using the Bliss shaders from [Github](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader), since the version on Modrinth and Curseforge does not support Distant Horizons as of now.

**SupersMC** is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed to provide players with an optimized gaming experience while expanding on the vast world of possibilities that Minecraft offers. This modpack is built with the intention of enhancing the core gameplay, adding exciting new features, and improving overall performance. 

## Key Features:

- **Performance Optimization**: SupersMC prioritizes performance, ensuring a smoother and more responsive gameplay experience. It optimizes resource usage and minimizes lag, allowing you to enjoy the game on a wide range of hardware configurations.

- **Expanded Gameplay**: Explore an extended array of content, including new biomes, dimensions, and creatures. Engage with unique challenges and explore new adventures that will keep you immersed in the game for hours on end.

- **Improved Aesthetics**: SupersMC introduces high-quality texture packs and shaders to enhance the visual appeal of your Minecraft world. Immerse yourself in stunning graphics that breathe life into the game.

- **More Animations**: Experience a livelier world with enhanced animations for both characters and environments. From smoother movements to dynamic interactions, the game feels more vibrant and engaging.

- **Quality of Life Improvements**: Enjoy a more user-friendly experience with quality of life improvements that streamline in-game tasks and make your gaming sessions more enjoyable. From inventory management to advanced user interfaces, everything is designed with your convenience in mind.

- **Multiplayer Compatibility**: Play with friends or other players on servers with ease, as SupersMC is designed to be compatible with popular multiplayer setups, offering a seamless cooperative and competitive gaming experience.

- **Regular Updates**: The SupersMC modpack is regularly updated to stay current with the latest Minecraft versions and mod developments, ensuring a consistent and evolving gaming experience.

SupersMC is your gateway to a more refined and feature-rich Minecraft adventure. Explore, build, and conquer in a world optimized for performance and brimming with new opportunities. Whether you're a seasoned player or a newcomer to Minecraft, this modpack is designed to cater to all types of gamers, promising an engaging and immersive experience.

Dive into SupersMC and redefine your Minecraft journey today!
